milestones.name: The "Visual Core" (MVP)
milestones.description: Prove that the pie chart is functional and user-friendly. Basic UI + Spring Boot CRUD.

milestones.name: The "Focus Engine"
milestones.description: Integrate the Pomodoro logic. Timer linked to active slice with state machine.

milestones.name: The "Sync & Alert" Layer
milestones.description: Real-time sync via WebSockets + FCM push notifications.

milestones.name: The "Refinement & Analytics"
milestones.description: Reports, social login, dark mode, soundscapes, CI/CD pipeline.

milestones.name: User Testing & Cosmetics
milestones.description: QA pass, refactoring, UI polish, bug fixes.
